name: bms-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for AI agent development - memory, knowledge management, and local LLM integration

plugins.name: agentbrain
plugins.description: Enterprise-grade persistent memory system with semantic retrieval, multi-tenant scoping, and auto-curation. Uses Qdrant vector DB and Ollama for 100% local operation - no API keys, no cloud. Includes governance features to prevent context rot.

plugins.name: honcho-bridge
plugins.description: Official Honcho memory system with Ollama integration for Claude Code. Installs and configures Honcho locally with Docker Postgres + Ollama (no API keys). Includes wiki export/import skills for knowledge management.
